title: COVID-19 Immunization Clinics - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > COVID-19 Immunization Clinics 4 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter No Filter Native American Community Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CENTERS FOR DISEASE CONTROL AND PREVENTION FLU AND COVID-19 VACCINE FINDER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers an online map of flu shot and COVID-19 vaccination locations searchable by zip code. Most sites listed are pharmacies. 1600 Clifton Road Atlanta, GA 30329 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email (800) 232-4636 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COQUILLE INDIAN TRIBE KO-KWEL WELLNESS CENTER COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of primary and preventive health care services to individuals and families. COVID-19 vaccines available; brand is Spikevax which is manufactured by Moderna. 630 Miluk Drive Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Federally recognized tribal members, children of tribal members, and residents of the community as capacity allows COVID-19 vaccinations: Tribal members, CIT employees, Kilkich residents, and KWC patients Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Vaccinations: Fridays by appointment Medical Helpline: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 888-9494 1 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOOD RIVER COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides childhood immunizations and some adult immunizations. Influenza (flu) and COVID-19 vaccines as they become available each season. Also, the program looks up vaccine records in the Oregon database to let you know what you or your child is due for. 1109 June Street Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 386-1115 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JACKSON COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides childhood immunizations, COVID-19, HPV, and travel immunizations. Influenza (flu) vaccines are provided as they become available each season, along with vaccine information. 140 S Holly Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted, and the HPV9 immunization for 9 y/o to 45 y/o Hours: Monday-Friday 9-11am and 1 to 4pm Email (541) 774-8209 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COQUILLE INDIAN TRIBE COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER HOOD RIVER COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION JACKSON COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION
